# terrible_dellemc_powerflex_device_v2 (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `capacity_limit_gb` (Number) Device capacity limit in GB.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `clear_error` (Boolean) Using the flag to clear error on a device. If the error continues to exist, the device will return to an error state as soon as it is accessed.
- `current_pathname` (String) Full path of the device to be added. Required while adding a device.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `device_group_id` (String) The ID of the device group. Required while adding a device. Mutually exclusive with *device_group_name*.
- `device_group_name` (String) The name of the device group. Required while adding a device. Mutually exclusive with *device_group_id*.
- `device_id` (String) Device ID. Mutually exclusive with *device_name*.
- `device_name` (String) Device name. Mutually exclusive with *device_id*.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `force` (Boolean) Using the Force flag to add a device. Using the flag to clear device error state without checking. Use this flag with caution, because all data on the device will be destroyed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `media_type` (String) Device media types. Required while adding a device.
- `new_device_name` (String) New name of the device.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) State of the device.
- `storage_node_id` (String) The ID of the storage node. Required while adding a device. Mutually exclusive with *storage_node_name*.
- `storage_node_name` (String) The name of the storage node. Required while adding a device. Mutually exclusive with *storage_node_id*.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `device_details` (String) Details of the device.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
